pathInstructions.title: How to get a full path
pathInstructions.mac.step1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
pathInstructions.mac.step3: Hold the Option key until Copy changes to Copy as Pathname.
pathInstructions.mac.step4: Click Copy as Pathname, then paste it here.
pathInstructions.mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, press Enter, then run pwd to see the full path.
pathInstructions.windows.step1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
pathInstructions.windows.step2: Click the address bar at the top so the full path appears.
pathInstructions.windows.step3: Copy the path, then paste it here.
pathInstructions.windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select Copy as path.
pathInstructions.linux.step1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
pathInstructions.linux.step2: Run pwd to print the full path.
pathInstructions.linux.step3: Copy the output and paste it here.
pathInstructions.linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.
manualPathDialog.title: Specify path manually
manualPathDialog.description: Browser security blocks apps from reading full local paths via a file picker. Copy the absolute path and paste it into the input.
manualPathDialog.mac.step2: Hold Option and right-click the folder.
manualPathDialog.mac.step4: Paste the result into the path input.
manualPathDialog.windows.step1: Find the folder in File Explorer.
manualPathDialog.windows.step2: Hold Shift and right-click the folder.
manualPathDialog.windows.step4: Paste the result into the path input.
manualPathDialog.terminal.step3: Copy the output and paste it into the path input.

settings.general.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
settings.general.personalLanguageDescrip: Choose the language used for this account. In local trusted mode, the choice is saved in this browser only.
settings.general.defaultLanguageDescript: Set the fallback language used when a signed-in user has not chosen a personal language yet.
settings.general.censorDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
settings.general.shortcutsDescription: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
settings.general.backupDescription: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
settings.general.feedbackDescription: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
settings.general.feedbackPromptSaved: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.

settings.general.feedbackDenyDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
settings.general.feedbackDevHint: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
settings.general.signOutDescription: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
settings.experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
settings.experimental.isolatedDescriptio: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
settings.experimental.restartDescription: In pnpm dev:once, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.

adapterManager.reinstallDescription: This will pull the latest version of {packageName} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
adapterManager.installExternalAdapterDes: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export createServerAdapter().
adapterManager.acceptsPlatformPaths: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.

adapterManager.installAdapterPackageHint: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
adapterManager.removeAdapterDescription: Are you sure you want to remove the {type} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.
adapterManager.removeAdapterNpmCleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.

routineDetail.concurrencyCoalesceDescrip: Keep one follow-up run queued while an active run is still working.
routineDetail.concurrencyAlwaysEnqueueDe: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if several runs stack up.
routineDetail.concurrencySkipDescription: Drop overlapping trigger occurrences while the routine is already active.
routineDetail.catchUpSkipDescription: Ignore schedule windows that were missed while the routine or scheduler was paused.
routineDetail.catchUpEnqueueDescription: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
routineDetail.signingModeBearerDescripti: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
routineDetail.signingModeHmacDescription: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
routineDetail.signingModeGithubDescripti: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
routineDetail.signingModeNoneDescription: No authentication. The webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.
routineDetail.label: Label
routineDetail.saveFailedBody: Paperclip could not save the routine.
routineDetail.runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
routineDetail.updateFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
routineDetail.addTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
routineDetail.triggerSavedBody: The routine cadence update was saved.
routineDetail.updateTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
routineDetail.deleteTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
routineDetail.rotateSecretFailedBody: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
routineDetail.selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
routineDetail.defaultAgentRequiredBody: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
routineDetail.saveSecretNow: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
routineDetail.defaultAgentRequiredBanner: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.
routines.concurrencyCoalesceDescription: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
routines.concurrencyAlwaysEnqueueDescrip: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
routines.concurrencySkipDescription: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.
routines.catchUpSkipDescription: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
routines.catchUpEnqueueDescription: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
routines.createdBodyLiveWorkflow: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
routines.createdBodyDraft: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
routines.updateFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
routines.runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
routines.defaultAgentRequiredBody: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
routines.selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
routines.description: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
routines.newRoutineDescription: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
routines.advancedDeliveryDescription: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routines.afterCreationHint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.
routines.empty: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.

issueDocuments.deleteConfirm: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.
